name: @metorial/hootsuite
description: Schedule, publish, and manage social media messages across multiple platforms (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Pinterest). Upload media (images and videos) for use in scheduled posts. Retrieve and manage social profiles, organizations, teams, and members. Approve, reject, or delete scheduled messages. Shorten links using Ow.ly. Receive real-time webhook notifications for message, comment, and application events. Manage member permissions and onboard users via SCIM provisioning.
